name: Azure DevOps Health
tagline: Inspect Azure resource and service health
description: List current resource availability across an Azure resource group and review service health events affecting a subscription.

auth.hint: Register a client with Microsoft Entra ID or obtain an Azure CLI/PowerShell access token for Azure Resource Manager, then provide the token for an identity authorized to read the target subscription.

tools.name: list_resource_group_health
tools.description: List the current Resource Health availability status for resources in one Azure resource group.

params.name: resourceGroupName
params.description: Case-insensitive resource group name, from 1 to 90 characters.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Resource Health API version; use 2025-05-01 for this documented contract.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Set to recommendedactions to expand recommended actions in each status.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData-style filter accepted by the operation.

tools.name: list_service_health_events
tools.description: List Azure service health events visible in a subscription.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Resource Health API version; use 2025-05-01 for this documented contract.

params.name: $filter
params.description: Filter events, for example by service or region.

params.name: queryStartTime
params.description: Start time for returned events; the service defaults to the previous three days.
